task_description: Implement the TeleExport desktop application based on the technical plan. Create the full Electron + React + Python project with IPC communication, auth flow, export engine, HTML formatter, and all UI components.

verification.summary: All 68 Python tests pass (0.45s). TypeScript compiles with no errors (src + electron). Vite production build succeeds (227KB JS + 23KB CSS). Test quality verified - tests exercise real logic (formatter grouping, media type detection, IPC dispatch, dedup cache).
